name: Anytime Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cooked & drained ground pork OR beef
8 strips cooked, drained and crumbled bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat the eggs in a bowl.
3. Add the other ingredients to the bowl and stir until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shells.
5. Bake for about 25 to 30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
